name: Orange-Whole Wheat Breakfast Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure carefully, placing all ingredients in the bread machine pan in the order recommended by the manufacturer.
2. Select Basic/White cycle. Use Medium or Light crust color. Do not use delay cycles.
3. Remove baked bread from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
Per 2 oz slice: Calories 160, protein 5g, carbohydrate 28g, fat 3g, cholesterol 0, sodium 290mg.
